response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video context and on-screen text for songs. 2. Song 1: "Ookami wa Akazukin ni Koi wo Shita" by Hitoshi-shizuku x Yama. 3. Song 2: "FLY HIGH!!" by Kazuumi Kumagai (BURNOUT SYNDROMES). 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs. 5. Compiled the scene data based on the video segments and lyrics found.
response.global_summary: The video is a gameplay session featuring a VTuber, where they introduce an 'Adventure Log' and perform two songs, "Ookami wa Akazukin ni Koi wo Shita" and "FLY HIGH!!", while interacting with a dragon character.

scenes.description: The VTuber performs the song "Ookami wa Akazukin ni Koi wo Shita" while sitting on a log, with the dragon in the background. Text 'Lyrics/Music: Hitoshi-shizuku x Yama' is displayed.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
偶然からはじまる必然の一場 面（ワンシーン）
遠くに⾒えたのは 逃げる赤色
不思議な森の奥で⾒つけた黒い影と
何かが始まる予感、怖くて逃げ出した
「出会い」は終わりに 続くシナリオ
だからわざと 遠回りをした
会いたい、なんて
触れたい、なんて
話したい、なんて
思わない
かよわい君と 狡い僕が
「出会う」其れが終わりさ
残酷だって罵ったって
運命は変わらない
ああ どうして、君が？
どうして、僕が？
おおかみと赤ずきん、なんだ
きっと君は今日もこの道を訪れる
そして僕は今日もずっと 見守るしかできない
... (full lyrics truncated by constraints, providing sufficient example)\
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A scene that begins from a coincidence
What I saw in the distance was a fleeing red color
With a black shadow found in the depths of a mysterious forest
I had a premonition that something would begin, and ran away, scared
'The meeting' is a scenario that leads to the end
So I intentionally took the long way around
I want to see you, I want to touch you, I want to talk to you
I never thought I'd say such things
With you, who is weak, and me, who is cunning
'Meeting' is the end
Even if I curse that it's cruel, the fate won't change
Ah, why you? Why me?
It's the Wolf and Little Red Riding Hood
I'm sure you'll visit this road again today
And I'll only be able to watch over you again today
... (full lyrics truncated by constraints, providing sufficient example)\
